description: Hotel Moderno is a hotel in central Madrid near Puerta del Sol. Its website presents rooms, offers, services, and booking information for guests.
summary: hotel-moderno.com exposes no documented public developer integration surfaces; the site is a hotel website with booking handled via on-site UI and references a third-party provider (Mirai), but no public API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI for developers was found on hotel-moderno.com.
